user.title: Connect to Smart Wine Cellar
user.description: Enter your Smart Wine Cellar API credentials. You can find your API token in **Settings → API Tokens** inside the app.

data_description.api_token: Your personal API token from the app settings
data_description.scan_interval: How often to push sensor readings (5–60 minutes)

sensor_mapping.title: Map sensors — {location} ({step})
sensor_mapping.description: Select which Home Assistant sensors to use for **{location}**. Leave blank to skip this location. The same sensor can be used for multiple locations (e.g. two racks sharing one thermometer).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Smart Wine Cellar. Check the URL and your network.
error.invalid_url: The URL must use http:// or https:// and cannot point to a local or loopback address.
error.no_mappings: No sensors were mapped. Please assign at least one temperature sensor.
error.subscription_required: Your Smart Wine Cellar account does not have an active subscription.

abort.already_configured: Smart Wine Cellar is already configured.
